name: Sven Svensson
description:
Sven Svensson is a supporting antagonist in the Henry Stickmin Series who appears as one of the two secondary antagonists of Completing the Mission alongside the Right Hand Man. He is an elite member of the Toppat Clan and the pilot for the Toppat Orbital Station. Depending on the pathway, Sven appears as either the leader of the Toppat Clan, the second in command, or next in line for the leadership of the clan after the Right Hand Man.

In all pathways where both Reginald Copperbottom and the previously mentioned Right Hand Man have been arrested to the DDP (Government Supported Private Investigator), Sven is the new leader of the last two remaining divisions of the Toppat Clan (the orbital station division and the train division), overseeing their plan to launch the Toppat Orbital Station finding it through files of plans by the old leaders as said in Special BROvert Ops. In pathways where only Reginald was arrested to the DDP (Relentless Bounty Hunter), he is the second in command of the Right Hand Man, who now leads the clan.

Sven is absent in all paths that don't use Government Supported Private Investigator as an Infiltrating the Airship ending (excluding Toppat Recruits, Master Bounty Hunter and Toppat 4 Life), but is still an important member due to being next in line for leadership after the Right Hand Man, and is shown in the luxury escape pod with the other elite Toppats in Valiant Hero.

He is voiced by PuffballsUnited.
